sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - NYINC Signature Sale 3130, Lot 36056 — Ancients
EGYPT. Alexandria. Tiberius (AD 14-37). BI tetradrachm (24mm, 13.92 gm, 12h). NGC MS 5/5 - 3/5. Dated Regnal Year 7 (AD 20/21). ΤΙΒΕΡΙΟΣ ΚΑΙΣΑΡ ΣΕΒΑΣΤΟΣ, laureate head of Tiberius right; L Ζ
sales.description:
Ancients
EGYPT. Alexandria. Tiberius (AD 14-37). BI tetradrachm (24mm, 13.92 gm, 12h). NGC MS 5/5 - 3/5. Dated Regnal Year 7 (AD 20/21). ΤΙΒΕΡΙΟΣ ΚΑΙΣΑΡ ΣΕΒΑΣΤΟΣ, laureate head of Tiberius right; L Ζ (date) below chin / ΘΕΟΣ-ΣΕΒΑΣΤΟΣ, radiate head of Divus Augustus right. RPC I 5089. Emmett 60. Dattari 78.

Ex Heritage Auctions, Auction 3098 (18 January 2022), lot 33245; Heritage Auctions, Auction 3051 (8 January 2017), lot 30151.

This splendid tetradrachm displays Tiberius's obsession with p...
